role.en: Health & Wellness Consultant — Movement, Digital Health UX & Product Design
role.es: Consultor de Salud y Bienestar — Movimiento, UX Digital en Salud y Diseño de Producto
role.de: Gesundheits- & Wellness-Berater — Bewegung, Digital Health UX & Produktdesign

en: Built & optimised websites end-to-end, prototyped app concepts & prepared multiple products for launch across health, wellness, service & digital-product contexts.
Designed health, movement & performance-focused digital experiences from research, positioning & user flows through to wireframes, UI, prototypes & handoff.
Translated complex health, wellness & behaviour-change concepts into simple onboarding, clear content, practical user journeys & supportive interfaces.
Used interviews, usability checks & early testing to identify friction points, clarify information architecture & simplify user decision-making.
Created reusable UI patterns & lightweight design systems, including components, states & tokens, to keep products consistent & easier to build.
Used AI-assisted coding & prototyping to validate UX decisions faster, align stakeholders & support cleaner design-to-development handoff.
Applied a behaviour-change lens across projects, focusing on adherence, motivation, confidence, habit formation & reducing real-world friction.

role.en: Territory Manager / Sales Representative — Sports Medicine & MedTech
role.es: Territory Manager / Representante de Ventas — Medicina Deportiva y MedTech

en: Supported business growth & service delivery across 4 hospitals & 20+ surgeons in a high-accountability orthopaedic sports medicine environment.
Partnered with surgeons, hospitals & clinical teams to understand workflows, constraints & adoption barriers across sports medicine products & procedures.
Translated frontline clinical & operational needs into clearer requirements, product education, onboarding plans & stakeholder communication.
Built repeatable enablement assets including guides, demos, training flows & product education materials to improve understanding & successful usage.
Led stakeholder alignment across clinical, commercial & operational teams, helping clarify decision criteria & reduce friction in procurement & onboarding.
Identified usage barriers, behaviour patterns & workflow pain points in the field, feeding insights back into messaging, process improvement & customer support.
Developed deeper domain knowledge across musculoskeletal injury, surgical workflows, rehabilitation pathways, sports medicine & performance-related care.

role.en: Research Scientist — Sports Therapy & Clinical Exercise Research
role.es: Científico Investigador — Terapia Deportiva e Investigación Clínica del Ejercicio

en: Contributed to research papers & supported the design, documentation & delivery of the Exercise-CC study across clinical exercise & sports therapy contexts.
Helped develop structured exercise protocols under real-world constraints, including medical risk, adherence, equipment, staffing & scheduling.
Contributed to nationwide SOPs through meticulous data capture, documentation & multi-clinic research coordination.
Gathered patient feedback through interviews, focus groups & structured communication, using insights to improve clarity, safety & program engagement.
Worked across hospital teams to support coordinated delivery & reduce fragmentation between research, clinical workflows & patient-facing exercise programs.
Applied exercise science, movement education & behaviour-change principles within clinical-adjacent research environments.

role.es: Consultor de Salud, Movimiento y Bienestar

en: Built an independent health & movement brand from scratch, including positioning, website, social media & YouTube, services, onboarding, client communication & program delivery.
Delivered practical wellbeing programs for insurers, organisations & individuals, including movement education, ergonomics & sustainable behaviour-change support.
Designed personalised movement, fitness & return-to-activity programs around client goals, injuries, motivation, confidence & real-life constraints.
Created habit-friendly programming, tracking templates, feedback loops & education resources to improve adherence & reduce repeated explanation.
Grew & retained a client base through marketing, referrals, SEO & clearer service positioning.
Improved client onboarding & intake processes so goals, constraints & expectations were easier to understand from the beginning.
Turned complex health & movement information into simple, usable education content clients could apply independently.

role.en: Studio Manager — Health, Fitness & Member Experience
role.es: Gerente de Estudio — Salud, Fitness y Experiencia de Socios

en: Managed day-to-day studio operations, including scheduling, staffing, member support, safety processes & service quality.
Improved onboarding & safety workflows so the member experience was more consistent & less dependent on individual staff style.
Identified recurring member pain points & improved workflows, templates & program structure to support engagement & retention.
Coordinated across coaches, trainers & therapy-adjacent staff to create a more joined-up experience for members.
Supported movement, injury-prevention & wellbeing programming across a broad member population.
Balanced operational demands with member experience, safety, communication & program delivery.

role.es: Gerente de Estudio y Consultor Corporativo

en: Delivered corporate health & movement support for employees & members, including ergonomics, exercise guidance, prevention & return-to-activity programming.
Designed practical movement programs tailored to individual goals, physical limitations, injury history & workplace constraints.
Standardised intake, tracking & program notes so progress was easier to understand, communicate & adjust.
Supported staff with consistent coaching processes, safety expectations & client communication.
Improved scheduling, reporting & service workflows to make delivery more predictable & easier to manage.
Helped clients translate health & movement advice into sustainable routines they could realistically follow.

experiences.company: The Forum Sports and Aquatics Centre, UoN

en: Delivered personal training, group training, health & fitness checks, and exercise prescription.

experiences.company: The Forum Sports and Aquatics Centre, UoN

en: Coached a wide range of levels and ages to develop water safety and improve stroke efficiency and technique.

role.es: Asistente Voluntario de Entrenamiento — Fuerza y Acondicionamiento (Juveniles)

en: Assisted in coaching the junior development team (ages 16–21) in high-performance strength & conditioning in the gym and on the field.
